address: Shop# 18B, Mall of Lahore, Tufail Road, Lahore Cantt, Pakistan
founder_bio: With over two decades of capturing elite weddings and luxury portraits, M. Saleem Tahir has established Al Noor Photographer Studio & Color Lab as a benchmark of artistic excellence. Based at the prestigious Mall of Lahore, his vision blends state-of-the-art lighting technology with timeless composition, turning your fleeting moments into premium visual legacies.
